document_metadata.title: Ali Imam UI - Complete Migration & Implementation Guide
document_metadata.subtitle: Vite.js to Ali Imam UI Component System
document_metadata.author: Ali Imam

content.description: This guide provides a complete migration path from a standard Vite.js + React project to one that uses Ali Imam UI as its exclusive component system. Ali Imam UI is a third-party registry for shadcn/ui that provides production-ready marketing blocks, effect components, UI primitives, icons, and background patterns.

key_facts.total_components: 50+ effect/UI components, 60+ blocks, 5 page templates, 1700+ icons, 350+ patterns

content.registry_configuration_note: Your existing project already has the correct registry configuration in components.json: "registries": {"@aliimam": "https://aliimam.in/r/{name}.json"}
guide_coverage: MCP server setup for AI-driven component installation

content.description: Ali Imam UI is a design system and component registry created by Ali Imam, a Design Engineer and Ambassador at 21st.dev. It extends shadcn/ui with specialized marketing blocks, visual effect components, and a comprehensive icon/pattern library.
tech_stack: Tailwind CSS v4 for utility-first styling
Radix UI primitives for accessible UI components

content.description: shadcn/ui is not a traditional component library. Instead of installing an NPM package, you install the source code of components directly into your project.

key_principles.name: Open Code
key_principles.description: Full ownership and ability to customize any component

key_principles.name: Composition
key_principles.description: Every component uses a common, composable interface

key_principles.name: Distribution
key_principles.description: Flat-file schema for easy sharing via registries

key_principles.name: AI-Ready
key_principles.description: Open code that LLMs can read, understand, and improve

content.description: The shadcn/ui registry system uses a JSON schema that defines how components are distributed. The Ali Imam registry follows this schema.
cli_installation_process: Reads components.json to find the @aliimam registry URL
Fetches the component definition from https://aliimam.in/r/hero-01.json
Downloads all files (component code, dependencies, CSS)
Places the component in your configured directory

content.description: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) server enables AI assistants to browse, search, and install components from registries using natural language.
example_commands: Add a hero section with gradient background
Install a pricing table with three pricing tiers

3_1_effect_components.title: Effect Components (15)
3_1_effect_components.description: Specialized visual effect components for creating stunning interfaces.

components.name: Shine Border
components.description: Animated shine sweep effect on borders

3_2_ui_primitives.title: UI Primitives (2)
3_2_ui_primitives.note: For standard UI primitives (Dialog, Card, Input, Select, etc.), use the base shadcn/ui registry: pnpm dlx shadcn add dialog card input select. Ali Imam UI focuses on effect components and marketing blocks.

3_3_marketing_blocks.title: Marketing Blocks (12 Categories, 60+ Variants)
3_3_marketing_blocks.description: Complete page sections ready to drop into your project.

vectors.description: Abstract shapes, scribbles, peeps, geometric forms for decorative use

4_pre_migration_checklist.title: Pre-Migration Checklist
4_pre_migration_checklist.description: Before starting the migration, verify your project meets these requirements.

content.description: Your components.json must include the Ali Imam registry.
content.vite_specific_note: For Vite projects, set "rsc": false as React Server Components are not supported outside Next.js. Also ensure your tsconfig.json includes the @/* path alias pointing to src/.

method_b_mcp.name: MCP Natural Language (AI-Driven)
example_commands: Add a hero section with dark gradient background
Install a pricing table with three pricing tiers
Add a testimonials carousel with auto-play

method_c_manual.name: Manual Copy from Website
method_c_manual.instructions: Visit aliimam.in/blocks, preview any block, click the Code tab, and copy the component files directly into your src/components/

content.description: Ali Imam UI components use CSS custom properties for theming. Your src/index.css must define these variables.
content.changing_base_color: To switch to a different color scheme (e.g., Blue), update the --primary values. Use the Ali Imam website theme selector at aliimam.in/blocks to preview colors, then apply the generated CSS.

content.html_import:
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

5_5_block_installation_workflow.title: Block Installation Workflow
workflow_steps: Plan your page structure - Identify which blocks you need (Header, Hero, Features, Pricing, CTA, Footer)
Preview blocks - Visit aliimam.in/blocks to preview variants
Use the theme selector - Choose preset, color, font, and radius at the bottom of the page
Copy generated code - Click 'Copy Code' to get themed component code
Paste into your project - Place in src/components/sections/
Customize content - Replace placeholder text, images, and links

dark_mode_setup.description: For Vite projects, use the next-themes approach adapted for client-side routing.

6_theme_system_deep_dive.title: Theme System Deep Dive
6_theme_system_deep_dive.description: The Ali Imam website features a powerful theme selector at the bottom of the Blocks and Pages pages. This section documents all available options.

6_1_theme_presets.title: 18 Theme Presets
6_1_theme_presets.description: Each preset is a complete pre-configured combination of colors, fonts, and styling.

content.description: The radius slider on the Ali Imam website controls the --radius CSS variable. Range: 0 to 1 (rem).
The Model Context Protocol enables AI assistants to install components.
supported_commands_examples: Install a hero section with a gradient background and centered text
Add a bento grid with 6 cards showing our product features
Create a pricing section with 3 tiers: Starter, Pro, Enterprise
Add an FAQ accordion with 5 common questions
Install a testimonials carousel with auto-play
Add a footer with 4 link columns and social icons
mcp_server_process: Search the Ali Imam registry for matching components
Install the selected component with all dependencies
Configure the component in your project

8_2_code_structure_analysis.title: Code Structure Analysis
8_2_code_structure_analysis.description: When you install a block, it generates code with this structure.
key_patterns: Components use 'use client' directive for client-side interactivity
Styling uses Tailwind classes + CSS variables (var(--primary))
Dark mode uses dark: Tailwind prefix
Blocks import from @/components/ui/ for base UI elements

8_3_css_variable_mapping.title: CSS Variable Mapping
8_3_css_variable_mapping.description: Components use these CSS custom properties that you must define in src/index.css.

issues.solution: Check tsconfig.json and vite.config.ts path aliases
Ensure Tailwind v4 is installed: npm list tailwindcss
Copy full CSS variable block to src/index.css
Add fallback: <div> with static gradient background

essential_commands.command: pnpm dlx shadcn add button card input dialog

content.pro_tip: Visit aliimam.in/blocks and use the theme selector at the bottom of the page to preview all theme presets, colors, and fonts in real-time before applying them to your project.
